raw.subject: Your Brazil page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your love for snuggle time with furry friends ❤️❤️❤️ is infectious! It's clear you've built a business around providing comfort and care to pets in Brazil.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean potential clients are having trouble finding and reaching you.

I sketched out a simple page idea that incorporates some of the great photos and messages you share on Facebook. It includes a services overview, a photo gallery, a contact section, and even a map with your hours.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/waggin-tails-pet-care-brazil

If you'd like to discuss building out a simple site like this for your business, I'd be happy to chat with you about a flat fee for local businesses. Just reply to this email or let's schedule a quick call to discuss the details.
